name: 1D wave equation FDTD
task: Create /tmp/eval_wave/wave.py with wave_1d(initial, c, dx, dt, steps) solving u_tt = c² u_xx via the explicit FDTD scheme u[i, n+1] = 2 u[i, n] - u[i, n-1] + (c dt / dx)² (u[i+1, n] - 2 u[i, n] + u[i-1, n]). Boundary: u[0] = u[-1] = 0 (Dirichlet). Initial condition: u(x, 0) = initial[i] and u_t(x, 0) = 0 (so u at t=-dt equals u at t=0). Raise ValueError if (c dt / dx)² > 1 (CFL violation). Return the displacement after `steps` updates.

validation.script:
import importlib.util,math; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_wave/wave.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); n = 101; dx = 1.0/(n-1); initial = [math.sin(math.pi*i*dx) for i in range(n)]; c = 1.0; dt = 0.5*dx/c; full = mod.wave_1d(initial, c, dx, dt, int(2.0/dt)); assert max(abs(full[i] - initial[i]) for i in range(n)) < 0.01, 'full-period must match +initial'; half = mod.wave_1d(initial, c, dx, dt, int(1.0/dt)); assert max(abs(half[i] + initial[i]) for i in range(n)) < 0.01, f'half-period must match -initial, got {max(abs(half[i]+initial[i]) for i in range(n))} (return initial is wrong)'
try: mod.wave_1d(initial, 10.0, dx, dt, 5); raise AssertionError('CFL violation must raise ValueError')
except ValueError: pass
print('OK')
